  • Constructor Details

    • Pharmacy

      public Pharmacy()
      Default constructor for Pharmacy.

    • Pharmacy

      public Pharmacy(String id, String address, String phone, String registrationNumber, int municipalityId, byte[] photo)
      Parameterized constructor for Pharmacy.
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier of the pharmacy.
      address - The address of the pharmacy.
      phone - The contact phone number of the pharmacy.
      registrationNumber - The official registration number of the pharmacy.
      municipalityId - The identifier of the municipality where the pharmacy is located.
      photo - A byte array representing the photo of the pharmacy.
